description: Spice up your style with this fashionable yet spacious wallet from wrangler. While it is well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement. Made of pure leather with textile lining Contrast stitch detailing on the cover with embossed brand logo Stitched leather strip running across the breadth for added structure Two main chambers for holding cash Convenient chambers for storing your cards Buttoned coin holder Concealed chamber below coin and card holder to store other essentials CareWipe dust away using a dry, clean cloth
